# Project Overview

## Introduction

This project aims to build a better markdown editor.

## Goals

- Ship version 1 by Q3
- Achieve 100 daily active users
- Support three AI providers

scenarios.docAfter:
# Product Roadmap
## Q1 Goals
* Improve system latency by 15%.
* Optimize database query performance.
* Reduce memory footprint by 10%.
## Q2 Goals
* Implement real-time analytics dashboard.
* Introduce user profile customization options.
* Develop and deploy a new API endpoint for external integration.
